name: Hale'iwa Beach House
tagline: North Shore oceanfront dining with sunset cocktails, surf-and-turf, and the best view of any restaurant in Haleiwa.
mustOrder: sunset cocktail on the oceanfront deck — the real draw
fish tacos or fresh catch of the day
parking: Parking lot at 62-540 Kamehameha Hwy; can fill up at sunset
bestTime: Arrive 30 min before sunset for the best deck seats. The view is the main event
talkStory: The food at Hale'iwa Beach House is solid but not extraordinary — you come here for the setting. It's one of the only North Shore restaurants right on the ocean, with an outdoor deck that faces west for golden-hour sunsets. The menu covers the expected surf-and-turf bases: poke, fish tacos, burgers, steak. The cocktail program is better than it needs to be. Good option for a relaxed North Shore dinner after a day at the beaches, especially if you want to sit outside and watch the waves.
